data.title: Sandfire Resources America Inc. Adopts  Semi-Annual Financial Reporting
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 10, 2026, Sandfire Resources America Inc. has made the decision to utilize Coordinated Blanket Order 51-933, known as CBO 51-933, which exempts certain venture issuers from the requirement of quarterly financial reporting. The company, also referred to as Sandfire America, will now transition to semi-annual financial reporting, abbreviated as SAR. This move signifies a shift towards less frequent financial disclosures and provides investors with updates on the company's performance every six months. The decision reflects Sandfire America's strategic approach to reporting practices and aims to streamline reporting obligations.

data.title: Li Auto Inc. Releases 2025 ESG Report and Inaugural Climate-Related Disclosures Report
data.description: Beijing, China - On April 10, 2026, Li Auto Inc. (Nasdaq: LI; HKEX: 2015), a prominent player in China’s new energy vehicle sector, unveiled its 2025 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report. The company also augmented its transparency efforts by issuing its inaugural Climate-Related Disclosures Report. This move signifies Li Auto's commitment towards sustainability and accountability to stakeholders.

data.title: Reduction of Pandora A/S’ share capital
data.description: During the Annual General Meeting of Pandora A/S on March 11, 2026, a decision was made to decrease the company's share capital by DKK 4,000,000 by eliminating 4,000,000 treasury shares with a nominal value of DKK 1 each.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs, incl. BlackRock, Fidelity, Morgan Stanley, saw $337.2M inflows on Thursday, marking best day since March.
data.description: On Thursday, a total of $68.2 million in inflows was reported for Bitcoin ETFs offered by Fidelity and Morgan Stanley. Additionally, four other Bitcoin ETFs saw increases in inflows as well on the same day.

data.title: Bitcoin researcher proposes quantum-safe solution without protocol update, but high costs hinder practical adoption.
data.description: A suggested solution has been proposed to allow for Bitcoin transactions that are resistant to quantum computing, without the need for a protocol alteration. However, the practical application of this method is hindered by significant computational expenses.

data.title: Milesight Launches EG71, the Industry's First Unified Gateway for Deep Building Integration
data.description: On April 10, 2026, in Xiamen, China, Milesight introduced the EG71 Building IoT Gateway to tackle smart building integration issues. The gateway is aimed at addressing the challenges that come with the increasing complexity of smart buildings. Milesight is a prominent supplier of cutting-edge IoT products, and their latest device is set to revolutionize integration in smart buildings.

data.title: "In Europe, For Europe": Haier Biomedical Spotlights Full-Scenario Lab Solutions at analytica Munich 2026
data.description: At the analytica 2026 event in Munich on April 10, 2026, Haier Biomedical showcased its comprehensive laboratory solutions with a focus on serving Europe. As a prominent player in life sciences and medical technology, the company highlighted its offerings tailored to the European market.

data.title: No More Fuel Anxiety! AION UT Debuts in Australia, Setting a New Benchmark for Urban Electric Vehicles
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia on April 10, 2026, the 2026 Melbourne Motor Show began with much excitement. GAC showcased four vehicle models from its product lines - GAC, AION. The display emphasized GAC's expertise in new energy vehicles and underscored their leading position in the industry.
